title: AFK
body:
# AFK Plugin

![Modrinth Version](https://img.shields.io/modrinth/v/Ium0trw9?style=for-the-badge&label=Latest%20Version)

## Description

The **AFK Plugin** for Minecraft allows players to toggle their "Away From Keyboard" (AFK) status with a simple command. When a player is marked as AFK, several protections are applied to ensure they are not disturbed. These protections include:

- Preventing damage from other players
- Blocking player movement
- Disabling player interactions

This plugin is ideal for players who want to avoid being bothered while they are AFK.

## Features

- **AFK Command:** Players can use `/afk` to toggle their AFK status.
- **AFK Protection:**
  - Prevents damage from being dealt to AFK players.
  - Disables player movement while they are AFK.
  - Blocks all interactions for AFK players (e.g., opening chests, using items, etc.).
- **Simple and lightweight:** Just install and start using.

## Installation

1. Download the plugin JAR file.
2. Place it in your server's `plugins` folder.
3. Restart your server to enable the plugin.

## Usage

Once the plugin is installed and the server is running, players can use the `/afk` command to toggle their AFK status.

- `/afk`: Toggle AFK status.
  - **AFK:** You will be marked as AFK, and all interactions, movement, and damage will be blocked.
  - **Not AFK:** You will return to normal gameplay.

## Commands

- `/afk`: Toggles the AFK status of the player executing the command.

## Permissions

- **afk.command**: Allows a player to toggle their AFK status.

## Dependencies

- Requires **Spigot** or **Paper** or **Purpur** or **Bukkit** 1.21+.

## Disclaimer

This plugin is provided as-is. The author is not responsible for any damages or issues that may arise from using this plugin.

## Support

For issues or feature requests, please contact the author directly or open an issue on the plugin's repository.

[RAISE AN ISSUE](https://github.com/Abhinav2011VS/AFK/issues)


## Connect With Us
- [Discord](https://discord.gg/uYjttvug) - Join our community for support and discussions.
- [Website](https://creations-inventostarz.pages.dev) - Visit our official site for more information and resources.
